title: Eva 333 dub release question
wikitext:
[]: Eva 3.33 dub release question.             Quote Post by TheDrmcvey » Sat Sep 14, 2013 4:27 pm Is there a possibility that Funimation would first release the dub on Toonami? I know if they did that, the movie would get high T.V ratings. Or would they do it the other way around and release the BD version first? Thoughts?

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sat Sep 14, 2013 5:51 pm Anything is possible, but I suspect the BD/DVD will come out first. I know the last ones got a small theater release as well.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Sun Sep 15, 2013 1:07 am Wont happen. They didnt do this with the previous 2 movies so I doubt they'll do it with this one.

[]:             Quote Post by Mako » Wed Sep 18, 2013 5:10 pm All I have to say is, if they even think about casting somebody else than Trina Nishimura for Mari and Allison Keith for Misato, I'm having a bitch fit.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Sep 18, 2013 5:53 pm They will release the discs well before any television airing. They run on tight margins and I doubt they'd want viewership on television to cut into direct sales, even if CN pays them a licensing fee to air it.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Sep 18, 2013 6:01 pm Evangelion 1.11 and 2.22 were strong sellers for Funimation and I doubt they would do anything to disrupt that. The Cartoon Network airings are done well after the home video release and are longtail efforts to renew interest while getting some revenue out of the airing.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Wed Sep 18, 2013 6:47 pm Mako wrote: All I have to say is, if they even think about casting somebody else than Trina Nishimura for Mari and Allison Keith for Misato, I'm having a bitch fit.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Sep 18, 2013 7:23 pm Funimation won't change the "Actors" between films. No worries there. ...Though once again the term actor is a loose one here. Nah. They'll follow the same release pattern they did with 1 & 2. It's close enough to the end of the year to say it's a given Funimation won't bring the film out in 2013. So they'll probably follow the exact same release pattern they had with the first two. I. Have a VERY limited theatrical run for a few weeks. I would not be surprised to see Evangelion 3.0 also get a heavy VOD push too with the way the film industry has gone lately. VOD is no longer the dirty stepchild it was a few years ago. In fact VOD might end up being the platform they go with. II. Release it on Bluray where it does phenomenal numbers for Funimation since it's one of the few "traditional" anime releases that appeals to people outside of the traditional anime demographic. III. THEN air it on Cartoon Network/Adult Swim when they feel the revenue from sales has slowed down a bit. Who knows, if Funimation picks up the pace & gets the film out on disc in the first quarter of 2014 I wouldn't be surprised to see it air in late '14. IV. Millions of people on Twitter bemoan Shinji for being a "pussy", "fag" & "twerp". V. I laugh with great vigor.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Sep 19, 2013 3:40 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: IV. Millions of people on Twitter bemoan Shinji for being a "pussy", "fag" & "twerp".

[]:             Quote Post by monitoradiation » Thu Sep 19, 2013 4:52 pm ElMariachi wrote: Oh, oh, can we make a bet about which kind of message appear the most : A : Shinji is a moron who can't do anything right and should just die B : Misato is a bitch C : Kaworu is a fucking fag D : why the fuck is Gendo cosplayed as Cyclop?! I sense immense amount of fun coming!

[]:             Quote Post by Veoren » Sat Sep 21, 2013 12:53 am ElMariachi wrote: Oh, oh, can we make a bet about which kind of message appear the most : A : Shinji is a moron who can't do anything right and should just die B : Misato is a bitch C : Kaworu is a fucking fag D : why the fuck is Gendo cosplayed as Cyclop?! I sense immense amount of fun coming!

[]:             Quote Post by monitoradiation » Sat Sep 21, 2013 1:01 am I like his Rebuild characterization better than in NGE, and the manga, now that I've read all of it. He was just strange in the manga. but boy did Rei make me weep like a little girl -.- Back to Kaworu - I'm not sure why but it feels like his character changed between movies in the Rebuild continuity. His demeanor is just different. Not that he got much screen time in the earlier movies but he was a bit egocentric it seems earlier, but in 3.33 he was kind of timid.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sat Sep 21, 2013 10:03 am Veoren wrote: Would they really diss Kaworu like that? Why? Cuz they hate his screentime? I loved his character in the movie.
summary:
[]: Eva 3.33 dub release question.             Quote Post by TheDrmcvey » Sat Sep 14, 2013 4:27 pm Is there a possibility that Funimation would first release the dub on Toonami? I know if they did that, the movie would get high T.V ratings. Or would they do it the other way around and release the BD version first? Thoughts?

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sat Sep 14, 2013 5:5
